name: mostSyncDealloc
title: mostSyncDealloc
syntax: Callback: void OnMostSyncDeallocResult(long deallocResult, long label);
description: This function releases reserved bandwidth for synchronous channels by sending a Dealloc system message to the TimingMaster.

The result is reported by means of the callback function OnMostSyncDeallocResult. This requires defining OnMostSyncDeallocResult in the CAPL program using the following signature: OnMostSyncDeallocResult(long deallocResult, long label)
This function is called on completion of the deallocation of channels triggered by the call of the function.
Whether the deallocation was successful and if so, which channels were deallocated, is indicated in the parameters described below.

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Channel label. MOST25: content of channels[0] in OnMostSyncAllocResult, see mostSyncAlloc. Value 0x7F (=DeallocAll) releases all synchronous channels.MOST150: Label number (see mostAllocTableGetCL)Value 0xFFF releases all synchronous channels previously reserved with mostSyncAlloc (VN2640 only).

availability: MOST25 MOST150 After measurement start Not in Stopmeasurement
